creator: utisoft@googlemail.com
text:
On 14 February 2010 09:53, Rob Farmer <rfarmer@predatorlabs.net> wrote:
> On Sun, Feb 14, 2010 at 1:13 AM, Chris Rees <utisoft@googlemail.com> wrote:
>> I actually did port MatIO, so I'll work on that. I'll runtime test it
>> when I have a chance, on 7.2-RELEASE.
>
> I made a preliminary port of MatIO before I got your message - a shar is at:
> http://www.predatorlabs.net/dl/patches/matio.txt
>
> It was fairly straightforward other than that it doesn't build shared
> libraries by default, so that had to be added. If you have a better
> version though, we can definitely use that.
>
> --
> Rob Farmer
>


Ah, actually it does build share libraries by default, but they're
hidden in src/.libs/

I'll open a PR with matio, and post the link here.

Chris
